extra.reason: Shipped in #28 (merged aec08ed). Writer (cmd/ledger.go) and reader (lambda/main.go) both on runledger/; infra IAM updated; 409 ledger records migrated from runs/ to runledger/ (verified: independent count match 409=409, byte-identical spot check); GET /v1/runs and /v1/runs/{id} verified live post-deploy, newest-first. Follow-up rosterbot-q3b filed for optional cleanup of the now-orphaned old runs/*.json ledger keys.

Live Fantrax GS limits wired into optimize + gscheck with env-var fallback; verified directly against the live league for periods 1/15/16/17 (16=15/19, the All-Star break value). go-fantrax PR: https://github.com/pmurley/go-fantrax/pull/7. Follow-up rosterbot-6ds tracks post-merge go.mod cleanup.

GS_TRACKING_ENABLED toggle deployed and verified healthy in production (25 runs, 0 failures since deploy). Fixed unrelated blocking cdk-deploy bug (lambda/go.mod). GS_MAX/GS_MIN SSM parameters deleted, confirmed no remaining references anywhere in the codebase.
